name: ecotrack
description: EcoTrack - Backend microservices and frontend apps monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.install:backend: cd backend/service-users && npm install && npm run prisma:generate && cd ../.. && cd backend/service-containers && npm install && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.install:frontend: cd front/ecotrack-front && npm install && cd ../.. && cd front/ecotrack-admin && npm install
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "cd backend/service-users && npm run dev" "cd backend/service-containers && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:frontend: concurrently "cd front/ecotrack-front && npm run dev" "cd front/ecotrack-admin && npm run dev"
scripts.build:backend: cd backend/service-users && npm run build && cd ../.. && cd backend/service-containers && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: cd front/ecotrack-front && npm run build && cd ../.. && cd front/ecotrack-admin && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
